message:
test(oracle): add 13 conformance tests for LIKE/GLOB, AUTOINCREMENT, LIMIT/OFFSET, savepoints, IN, EXISTS, ORDER BY, BETWEEN, views, aggregation, correlated subqueries, INSERT variants

All 13 new oracle tests pass with zero mismatches against C SQLite.
Core: 1663 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
